description: Manage devcontainer lifecycle for a mentat worktree

evals.description: container up is idempotent (safe to call twice)
run exits 99 when container not running
compose_synth generates valid devcontainer.json from docker-compose.yml

eval_queries: start the devcontainer for this worktree
run 'uv run pytest' inside the container
diagnose container issues for this worktree
